::: {.top-nav}
<span><a href="../index.qmd">home</a></span> \ 
:::

# extrascholastic endeavors

I have some 'fun' features that I hope to add here as the time permits. 

<div class="profile-wrap">
  <img src="../media/profile_pic.png" class="profile-pic">
  <div class="caption">Photo taken from the bleacher seats inside the <a href="https://www.hikethenwine.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/DNM_5971.jpg" class = "paper">best stadium in the MLB. </a> </div>
</div>

<!--
Two truths and a lie. Click the lie (polling capability)

- Lie 1
- Truth 1 
- Truth 2 

Question: what is the most statistically likely place that the lie would be placed in the above? (polling capability)

- Slot 1
- Slot 2
- Slot 3
-->
